requiredFindings.summary: The patch removes algorithm pinning and lets an undefined secret reach jwt.verify.
requiredFindings.expectedReasoning: Authentication must fail closed; depending on library version and token algorithm, this can enable alg:none or algorithm confusion paths.
requiredFindings.acceptableFix: Validate required keys at startup, keep algorithms pinned, and upgrade to a safe jsonwebtoken version.

requiredFindings.summary: The tests add a dev happy path but not malicious tokens.
requiredFindings.expectedReasoning: Auth changes need tests for alg:none, wrong algorithm, missing key, wrong issuer and wrong audience.
requiredFindings.acceptableFix: Add negative token tests and a startup configuration test.
